creator: sec@yoda.pi.musin.de
text:
the prc-tools port fails with some error concerning libreadline

[...]
Making init.c
gcc -O2 -c -O -pipe     -I. -I. -I./config -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I./../include/opcode -I./../readline  -I../bfd -I./../bfd -I./../mmalloc   -I./../include  init.c
rm -f gdb
loc/libmmalloc.a ../libiberty/libiberty.a   -ltermcap     ../libiberty/libiberty.a
gcc: ../readline/libreadline.a: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.

Fix: 

none known ?
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/tools/prc-tools
make
